title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Granules India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Granules India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Granules India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Granules India Advisory Limited:
Granules India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
